title: cuscuta epithymum var. subulata
intro: Cuscuta epithymum var. subulata, also known as small-wedged dodder, is a type of flowering plant in the dodder family, Convolvulaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including menopausal symptoms, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Cuscuta epithymum var. subulata are attributed to its ability to balance hormones, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
